requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Smart Functions, EMC, and Radio Readiness

summary.en: Antigua and Barbuda has no confirmed nationwide public EV charging back-office mandate comparable to large EV markets, and the local EV market remains essentially non-existent or very early-stage. For networked chargers, hotels, fleets, tourism sites, government projects, or renewable-energy pilots may still require OCPP interoperability, remote monitoring, metering, fault reporting, payment integration, cybersecurity controls, and EMC evidence. Chargers with cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, or other radio modules should be checked for local telecommunications and importer requirements in addition to IEC 61000 EMC and site power-quality review.
summary.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达未确认存在类似大型电动汽车市场的全国公共充电后台强制要求，当地电动汽车市场仍基本不存在或处于非常早期阶段。对于联网充电桩，酒店、车队、旅游场所、政府项目或可再生能源试点仍可能要求OCPP互操作、远程监控、计量、故障报告、支付集成、网络安全控制及EMC证据。带蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他无线模块的充电桩，除IEC 61000 EMC和站点电能质量审查外，还应核查当地电信和进口商要求。
summary.zht: 安地卡及巴布達未確認存在類似大型電動汽車市場的全國公共充電後台強制要求，當地電動汽車市場仍基本不存在或處於非常早期階段。對於聯網充電樁，酒店、車隊、旅遊場所、政府項目或可再生能源試點仍可能要求OCPP互操作、遠程監控、計量、故障報告、支付集成、網絡安全控制及EMC證據。帶蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他無線模組的充電樁，除IEC 61000 EMC和站點電能質量審查外，還應核查當地電信和進口商要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — project or operator requirement for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2 DC communication
Local telecommunications or radio equipment requirements for cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, or smart-payment modules

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. Domestic network protocols may be operator-specific or OCPP-based, but China GB/T 27930 is not a substitute for OCPP back-office interoperability, IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 CCS2 communication, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, or local radio approvals.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间。国内联网协议可能为运营商专有或基于OCPP，但中国GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP后台互操作、IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 CCS2通信、IEC 61000 EMC证据或当地无线审批。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間。國內聯網協議可能為運營商專有或基於OCPP，但中國GB/T 27930不能替代OCPP後台互操作、IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 CCS2通訊、IEC 61000 EMC證據或當地無線審批。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China SRRC / radio approvals where in scope

gap.en: For networked exports, confirm the OCPP version, backend acceptance tests, SIM or telecom provisioning, payment integration, metering data format, remote firmware update controls, and cybersecurity expectations. For CCS2 DC products, replace the China GB/T 27930 vehicle-communication stack with the IEC/CCS stack required by the connector and vehicle fleet. Prepare IEC 61000 EMC test evidence and radio-module documentation before tendering or shipment.
gap.zh: 对于联网出口产品，应确认OCPP版本、后台验收测试、SIM或电信配置、支付集成、计量数据格式、远程固件更新控制及网络安全预期。对于CCS2直流产品，应将中国GB/T 27930车辆通信栈替换为接口和车辆车队所需的IEC/CCS通信栈。投标或出货前应准备IEC 61000 EMC测试证据及无线模块文件。
gap.zht: 對於聯網出口產品，應確認OCPP版本、後台驗收測試、SIM或電信配置、支付集成、計量數據格式、遠程固件更新控制及網絡安全預期。對於CCS2直流產品，應將中國GB/T 27930車輛通訊棧替換為接口和車輛車隊所需的IEC/CCS通訊棧。投標或出貨前應準備IEC 61000 EMC測試證據及無線模組文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory when required by project owner, charge-point operator, public procurement, fleet/tourism site, telecom rules, or radio-equipment scope; EMC evidence is commonly required for electrical acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication but is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for CCS2 communication or Antigua and Barbuda project integration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a mature national OCPP mandate, but do treat OCPP, IEC 61000 EMC, radio-module documentation, and CCS2 communication as likely project checks for any networked or public-facing charger. GB/T 27930-only DC communication is not enough for CCS2 deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定当地已有成熟的全国OCPP强制要求，但对于任何联网或面向公众的充电桩，应将OCPP、IEC 61000 EMC、无线模块文件和CCS2通信视为可能的项目检查项。仅支持GB/T 27930的直流通信不足以用于CCS2部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定當地已有成熟的全國OCPP強制要求，但對於任何聯網或面向公眾的充電樁，應將OCPP、IEC 61000 EMC、無線模組文件和CCS2通訊視為可能的項目檢查項。僅支持GB/T 27930的直流通訊不足以用於CCS2部署。
